extDesc.message: Alt+Z screenshot → AI multimodal → sidebar chat

screenshotCommandDesc.message: Capture selection and send to AI

emptyState.message:
Alt+Z to capture and send
Alt+X toggle sidebar · Alt+C clear chat

inputPlaceholder.message: Ask a follow-up… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter to break)

overlayHint.message: Drag to select capture area · Esc to cancel

settingsPromptHint.message: Selected prompt will be used automatically with screenshots; empty prompts are ignored

errorNoSettings.message: Please fill in API URL, API Key, and Model Name in the Settings panel

errorNoSettingsSidebar.message: Please fill in API URL, API Key, and Model Name in the Settings panel on the right

errorNoTabInfo.message: Cannot get tab info, please refresh the page

errorCaptureNoPermission.message: Screenshot failed: please grant extension permissions, or refresh the page and try again

errorContextInvalidated.message: Extension has been updated, please refresh the page and try again

errorHttpsRequired.message: Security: only HTTPS API URLs are supported. Please update your settings.

errorInvalidUrl.message: Invalid API URL format. Please check and try again.

errorNetworkFailed.message: Network request failed. Please check the API URL and your connection.

systemPrompt.message:
You are Open Searchan, an AI assistant developed by singal-人类智慧研究社, focusing on identify image and response. Today is __DATE__.

Please always respond in the user's language. Use Markdown for formatting. Use LaTeX for math: inline $...$, block $$...$$.
